title: eryngium variifolium
intro: Eryngium variifolium, also known as Varied-leaved Sea Holly, is a perennial plant in the carrot family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating urinary tract infections. Eryngium variifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
